The Problem

Real Estate Agents Are Losing Leads Every Day

Slow response times and manual follow-ups are costing you crores in missed sales opportunities.

😴

Missed Leads at Night

Leads arrive at 2AM while you sleep. By morning, they've already called your competitor.

🐢

Slow Response Times

Manual replies take hours. Today's buyers expect instant responses — or they move on.

🔁

Repetitive Follow-ups

Your team wastes hours sending the same brochures, pricing details and reminders.

📉

Low Conversion Rates

Without proper qualification, your sales team wastes time on cold, unqualified leads.

The Solution

Meet AmiFlow — Your 24/7 Sales Assistant

Our AI-powered WhatsApp automation handles everything from first contact to site visit booking — automatically.

⚡

Instant WhatsApp Replies

Respond to every lead in under 5 seconds, 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.

🤖

AI Lead Qualification

Automatically score and qualify leads based on budget, location, and intent.

📎

Auto Brochure Sharing

Send the right property brochure instantly based on the lead's preferences.

📅

Site Visit Booking

Let leads self-book site visits through WhatsApp without any manual coordination.

🔔

Smart Follow-ups

Automated reminder sequences that nurture cold leads back into hot buyers.

Our Services

Everything You Need to Automate Sales

01

WhatsApp Chatbot Automation

Custom-built WhatsApp bots trained on your property listings, pricing, and sales scripts. Fully automated, fully branded.

02

AI Lead Qualification

Intelligent conversation flows that identify serious buyers and filter out time-wasters before they reach your team.

03

CRM Integration

Seamlessly push qualified leads into your CRM with full conversation history and lead scores attached.

04

Automated Follow-ups

Multi-step drip sequences via WhatsApp that re-engage cold leads at the perfect moment in their buying journey.

05

Property Catalog Automation

Dynamic property catalogs sent automatically based on buyer preferences, budget, and location filters.

How It Works

Up and Running in 3 Simple Steps

1

Connect Your Leads

Link your ads, portals, and landing pages. Leads from 99acres, MagicBricks, Google Ads — all flow into one place.

2

We Build the Automation

Our team builds custom WhatsApp workflows tailored to your properties, sales process, and buyer personas.

3

Leads Convert Automatically

Watch as leads are qualified, nurtured, and booked for site visits — completely on autopilot.

Live Demo

See the Automation in Action

Watch how AmiFlow handles a real estate inquiry from first message to site visit booking.

AF
AmiFlow — Real Estate Bot
● Typing...
Hello, I'm interested in buying a flat in Pune. Can you help?
Welcome! 👋 I'm AmiFlow's property assistant. I'd love to help you find your dream home in Pune. What's your preferred area?
Hinjewadi or Wakad, 3BHK preferred
Excellent choice! 🏙️ We have 4 premium 3BHK units in Hinjewadi Phase 2. Price range: ₹1.1Cr – ₹1.4Cr. Sending brochure now! 📎
Great! When can I visit?
📅 Choose your preferred slot:
• Saturday 10AM–1PM
• Sunday 11AM–2PM

Reply 1 or 2 to confirm instantly!
